nodes.name: Will To Survive
nodes.description: With full confidence, I can say that this was the first 'High Quality' game I made. This is my first 3d game on Unity. It was very challenging since I had to research and learn a lot while developing. I am very proud of this game since I finally made something from my favourite genres; Zombies and FPS! It comprises of AI, FPS mechanics like movement, shooting, weapon changing, different weapons etc.
